headline: Exclusive-SPS Commerce explores sale amid activist pressure, sources say
summary: Supply chain software maker SPS Commerce is exploring a sale amid pressure from ‌activist investors, according to three people familiar with the matter.  The ‌company is working with investment bank Morgan Stanley on the potential sale, which is ​expected to draw interest from private equity firms, the sources said, requesting anonymity to discuss confidential matters.  SPS Commerce and Morgan Stanley did not immediately respond to requests for comment.
